name: projects_write
description: Create and manage GitHub Projects: create projects, add/update/delete items, create status updates, and add iteration fields.

body.description: The body of the status update (markdown). Used for 'create_project_status_update' method.

field_name.description: The name of the iteration field (e.g. 'Sprint'). Required for 'create_iteration_field' method.

issue_number.description: The issue number. Required for 'add_project_item' when item_type is 'issue'. Also accepted by 'update_project_item' to resolve the item by issue number (combine with item_owner and item_repo).

item_id.description: The project item ID. Required for 'delete_project_item'. For 'update_project_item', provide either item_id, or (item_owner + item_repo + issue_number) to resolve the item by issue.

item_owner.description: The owner (user or organization) of the repository containing the issue or pull request. Required for 'add_project_item' method. Also accepted by 'update_project_item' when resolving the item by issue number.

item_repo.description: The name of the repository containing the issue or pull request. Required for 'add_project_item' method. Also accepted by 'update_project_item' when resolving the item by issue number.

item_type.description: The item's type, either issue or pull_request. Required for 'add_project_item' method.

iteration_duration.description: Duration in days for iterations of the field (e.g. 7 for weekly, 14 for bi-weekly). Required for 'create_iteration_field' method.

iterations.description: Custom iterations for 'create_iteration_field' method. Only set this when you need iterations with varying durations, breaks between them, or specific titles. Otherwise omit it: GitHub auto-creates three iterations of 'iteration_duration' days starting on 'start_date', which is the right choice for most cases.

owner.description: The project owner (user or organization login). The name is not case sensitive.

owner_type.description: Owner type (user or org). Required for 'create_project' method. If not provided for other methods, will be automatically detected.

project_number.description: The project's number. Required for all methods except 'create_project'.

pull_request_number.description: The pull request number (use when item_type is 'pull_request' for 'add_project_item' method). Provide either issue_number or pull_request_number.

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Used for 'create_project_status_update' and 'create_iteration_field' methods.

status.description: The status of the project. Used for 'create_project_status_update' method.

target_date.description: The target date of the status update in YYYY-MM-DD format. Used for 'create_project_status_update' method.

title.description: The project title. Required for 'create_project' method.

updated_field.description: Object describing the field to update and its new value. Required for 'update_project_item'. Two shapes are accepted: (1) by ID — {"id": 123456, "value": "..."}; (2) by name — {"name": "Status", "value": "In Progress"}. For single-select fields, option-name resolution requires the by-name shape; on the by-ID shape, pass the option ID. Set value to null to clear the field.
